title: Verify website title
expected_result: The title of the webpage should be 'Example Domain'

title: Verify website URL
expected_result: The URL displayed in the address bar should be 'https://example.com'

title: Verify existence of link
expected_result: The link 'IANA Root Zone Database' should be present

title: Verify correctness of link destination
steps: Click on the 'IANA Root Zone Database' link
expected_result: The browser should be redirected to the URL: https://iana.org/domains/example

title: Verify page load time
steps: Navigate to the URL: https://example.com and wait for the page to fully load
expected_result: The webpage should load within a reasonable amount of time

title: Verify page structure
steps: Navigate to the URL: https://example.com and inspect the page structure
expected_result: The webpage should be well-structured and readable

title: Check for console errors
steps: Navigate to the URL: https://example.com and inspect the browser console
expected_result: 'Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 404 ()' should not appear in the console

title: Check for broken links
steps: Navigate to the URL: https://example.com and inspect the webpage for any broken links
expected_result: No broken links should be present

title: Check for HTTPS encryption
steps: Navigate to the URL: https://example.com and inspect the webpage's security
expected_result: The website should be using HTTPS encryption

title: Check for valid SSL certificate
steps: Navigate to the URL: https://example.com and inspect the webpage's SSL certificate
expected_result: The SSL certificate should be valid
